plugins.name: family-pack
plugins.description: A cast of desi family-member code-analysis agents built on auk. Slash commands: /family-pack:buaji (issues), :padosi (secrets), :chachaji (token/cost), :saasuma (quality gate), :sharmabeta (idiomatic benchmark), :chotacousin (sandboxed fuzzing), :family (starter trio). Deterministic engine; Hinglish is a render skin (use --professional to strip it).
